description: GitHub Project board fields are planning signals. The current automation produces a report-only plan from live issue metadata; fast PR review and mergeability state is derived from native GitHub PR state.

dry_run_issue_conflicts.message: Accepted work also carries support/reproduction triage labels.
A parent tracker also carries contributor-pickup labels.
`status:no-stale` is present on work already protected by `status:in-progress`.
`status:no-stale` is present on blocked work; verify a separate stale exemption is still needed.
Blocked work also carries contributor-pickup labels.

dry_run_issue_warning_rules.message: `status:blocked` is present; keep the blocker reason visible before relying on stale protection.
`status:no-stale` is present; verify the issue has a visible reason and next decision surface.

dry_run_issue_status_rules.name: closed_not_planned
dry_run_issue_status_rules.reason: Issue is closed as not planned.

dry_run_issue_status_rules.name: closed_terminal_resolution_label
dry_run_issue_status_rules.reason: Issue is closed with a terminal resolution label.

dry_run_issue_status_rules.name: closed_default
dry_run_issue_status_rules.reason: Issue is closed without a terminal no-pursue signal.

dry_run_issue_status_rules.name: open_conflicting_routing
dry_run_issue_status_rules.reason: Issue has conflicting routing signals and needs maintainer review before board movement.

dry_run_issue_status_rules.name: open_blocked
dry_run_issue_status_rules.reason: Blocked work stays visible in backlog planning until the blocker clears or an implementer is active.

dry_run_issue_status_rules.name: open_in_progress
dry_run_issue_status_rules.reason: `status:in-progress` means an open PR is actively targeting this issue.

dry_run_issue_status_rules.name: open_tracker_or_rfc
dry_run_issue_status_rules.reason: Tracker and RFC issues are accepted coordination surfaces, not ordinary pickup-ready implementation tasks.

dry_run_issue_status_rules.name: open_needs_reproduction_or_support
dry_run_issue_status_rules.reason: Support/reproduction labels mean the issue is not implementation-ready yet.

dry_run_issue_status_rules.name: open_contributor_ready
dry_run_issue_status_rules.reason: Contributor-pickup labels indicate the scope is ready enough for external help.

dry_run_issue_status_rules.name: open_accepted_backlog
dry_run_issue_status_rules.reason: `status:accepted` keeps the issue as valid backlog without an active implementation signal.

dry_run_issue_status_rules.name: open_default_intake
dry_run_issue_status_rules.reason: No deterministic routing label was found.

non_goals: CI enforcement of Project field state
manual mirror of native PR state
